drinks.name: Ceremonial Matcha Latte
drinks.description: Stone-ground Uji matcha whisked with steamed oat milk. Smooth, earthy, lightly sweet.

drinks.name: Usucha
drinks.description: Traditional thin matcha prepared with hot water. For purists who want the real taste.

drinks.name: Iced Matcha Frappe
drinks.description: Blended iced matcha with milk and light sweetness. Best for hot afternoons.

drinks.name: Hojicha Matcha Latte
drinks.description: Roasted green tea meets matcha for a nutty, low-caffeine latte.

drinks.name: Strawberry Matcha
drinks.description: Layered strawberry puree and matcha milk. Sweet, creamy, very Instagrammable.

drinks.name: Brown Sugar Matcha
drinks.description: Brown sugar syrup at the bottom, matcha milk on top. Stir before drinking.

drinks.name: Koicha
drinks.description: Thick, intense matcha for experienced drinkers. Rich and slightly bitter.

drinks.name: Espresso Matcha Fusion
drinks.description: A shot of espresso layered with matcha milk. Bitter, creamy, energizing.

drinks.name: La Bleu Nuage
drinks.description: Silky soft cheesecake meets a buttery biscuit crust that crumbles like Parisian daydreams. Paired with a latte topped with cloud-soft marshmallows that melt into every sip. This sweet and tangy combination is light enough to float your afternoon away.

drinks.name: Cest la tea
drinks.description: Match your floral and cirtusy tea set with three French classics. Amour a Trois pastry set Creme Brulee + Strawberry Cake + Macaron - Paris in 3 bites.

drinks.name: Petit Brule et Latte
drinks.description: Velvety pudding topped with caramel sweetness. Paired with  fluffy cream topped cinnamon crumbs latte to balance the rich caramel, a combo for comfort.

drinks.name: Mon Chou Duvet
drinks.description: Exquisite baked fluff on buttery cinnamon crumbs and a classic latte or tea- a pair that compares to a humble morning on a Paris balcony nestled in this serene greenhouse cloud combination.
ingredients: Creampuff + Beverage of choice (latte or tea)
